## Problem / motivation

<!-- What problem does this feature solve? Who benefits? Be concrete: "As a store manager I need X because Y." -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What would you build? Rough sketch is fine — no need for full specs. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches you thought about and why they fall short. -->

## Scope estimate

- [ ] Small (< 1 day — isolated UI change or small hook)
- [ ] Medium (1-3 days — new component or DB column)
- [ ] Large (> 3 days — new table, new Edge Function, or cross-cutting concern)

## Additional context

<!-- Mockups, links, related issues, affected stores. -->
